column1: # /Print Options Advanced Device — pick the CUPS printer name that
# `/Print Printer` will pass as `lp -d <name>`. The Advanced submenu
# Fonts | Images | Layout | Priority | Wait | Quit); only Device and
# Quit are wired today. Storage is unit-tested via
# l123-print::encode::lp::lp_args; this transcript covers the menu
# /P P → printer session, no path prompt.
# /Q from session menu drops the session and returns to READY.
